hooks.command: if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]] && [[ "$FILE" != */llm_bridge/* ]] && [[ "$FILE" != */llm_client/* ]] && [[ "$FILE" != */ai_client/* ]] && [[ "$FILE" != */llm_gateway/* ]]; then DIRECT_IMPORT=$(grep -nE '^(import openai|from openai|import anthropic|from anthropic|from google\.generativeai|import google\.generativeai|from google\.genai|import google\.genai)' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null); if [[ -n "$DIRECT_IMPORT" ]]; then echo "[llm-bridge] WARNING: Direct LLM SDK import detected in $FILE — route calls through LLMBridge instead:"; echo "$DIRECT_IMPORT"; exit 2; fi; fi

if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then HARDCODED_KEY=$(grep -nE '(sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|sk-ant-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|AIza[a-zA-Z0-9]{30,})' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null | grep -v '#'); if [[ -n "$HARDCODED_KEY" ]]; then echo "[llm-bridge] WARNING: Potential hardcoded API key detected in $FILE — use environment variables or .env instead:"; echo "$HARDCODED_KEY"; exit 2; fi; fi
